name: @metorial/msg91
description: Send and manage multi-channel communications across SMS, Email, WhatsApp, Voice, and RCS. Generate, send, resend, and verify OTPs. Create and manage message templates with variable substitution. Launch multi-channel campaigns with scheduling, retry logic, and segment-based targeting. Manage contacts, phonebook fields, segments, and user events. Send WhatsApp interactive messages with buttons, lists, and product catalogs. Execute voice calls including text-to-speech, IVR flows, and click-to-call sessions. Send rich RCS messages with cards, carousels, suggested replies, and actions. Validate email addresses, verify domains, and track delivery reports. Manage subaccounts and retrieve messaging logs and analytics.
